python3 -c "
import os, csv
base = '/home/mrsar/protein-ag/past-published-data/disease-relevant non-inhibited'
datasets = []
for root, dirs, files in os.walk(base):
    for f in files:
        if f == 'fit.tsv':
            datasets.append(os.path.join(root, f))
datasets.sort()
print(f'Total datasets: {len(datasets)}')
for p in datasets[:15]:
    name = p.replace(base+'/', '')
    with open(p) as f:
        reader = csv.reader(f, delimiter='\t')
        header = next(reader)
        rows = list(reader)
    ncols = len(header)
    nrows = len(rows)
    x0_vals = [float(r[0]) for r in rows if r]
    x1_vals = [float(r[1]) for r in rows if r]
    y_vals = [float(r[-1]) for r in rows if r]
    print(f'{name[:50]}: {nrows}r, x0=[{min(x0_vals):.2g},{max(x0_vals):.2g}], x1=[{min(x1_vals):.2g},{max(x1_vals):.2g}], y=[{min(y_vals):.2g},{max(y_vals):.2g}]')
"
